evals.prompt: I just created some impex files. Can you check if they're valid before I import them?
evals.context: User wants to validate impex files before importing to Business Manager
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger validate-impex skill, check XML syntax, validate services, site preferences, cross-references

evals.prompt: My services.xml import failed. Help me figure out what's wrong.
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger validate-impex to identify XML or configuration errors

evals.prompt: Validate the impex files in my app to make sure they're correct
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger validate-impex, run all validation checks, report specific errors with fixes
